title: astragalus cyprius
intro: Astragalus cyprius, also known as Cypriot milkvetch or Cypriot astragalus, is a perennial legume native to Cyprus and southwestern Asia, characterized by its delicate white or pink flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Astragalus cyprius include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Astragalus cyprius can be consumed as a herbal preparation, often available in the form of capsules, teas, or infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to boost overall well-being and resilience.
